full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #97 (2026-07-19)

PULSE
Health: 0.5807 (C). 1060 wallets, 319 contributors. 12 memos today vs 23 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
30 reward payments, 130946 PFT distributed to 13 contributors. Top earner: rKjozZ...kf4u (21000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC).

MOVERS
No activity data. 2 new wallet(s) this week. 121 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.2%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: partial. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-06-19): 264 transactions from 11 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
